author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Phase 3 epic. Two crates: ferrotorch-optim (Optimizer trait, SGD, Adam, AdamW, RMSprop, Adagrad, LR schedulers) and ferrotorch-serialize (state dict save/load, SafeTensors, training checkpoints). Design doc: .design/phase-3-optim-serialize.md (11 REQ, 13 AC). Depends on Phase 1+2 (both complete).
